warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant did not offer a summary of the role play or identify any issues.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant either presented a summary of the role play OR outlined the problems.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant both provided a summary of the role play AND clearly stated the problems.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant showed a thorough understanding of the role play scenario and precisely articulated the problems.

criteria.name: Communicates position on role play scenario

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No stance was conveyed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant expressed a viewpoint that was not relevant to the core issue.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant articulated a clear stance regarding the problem.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant professionally presented their stance on the problem within the scenario.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No resolution was put forward.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solution was offered, but the plan for putting it into practice was not detailed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible solution was presented, along with a well-developed plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical solution and a comprehensive implementation strategy were developed, including the identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Displays empathy/diplomacy when responding to role play scenario

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Neither understanding nor tact was shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either understanding or tact was demonstrated in handling the role play situation.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both understanding and tact were shown when addressing the role play situation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant's use of understanding and tact contributed positively to resolving the role play scenario.

criteria.name: Shows knowledge of terminology and components related to the role play

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No comprehension of the role play was evident.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Relevant terms were mentioned but not elaborated upon.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A clear grasp of terminology was shown and effectively incorporated into the presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Terminology was communicated with enough clarity for the client (judge) to proceed independently.

criteria.name: Demonstrates conflict resolution and closure to the role play

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No conclusion was provided for the situation.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The situation was brought to an end OR the conflict was settled.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The conflict was resolved, and the situation reached a conclusion.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The conflict was resolved, the situation concluded, and the client (judge) expressed satisfaction.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor was prepared, but the presentation lacked a logical flow.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent and logical sequence.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation flowed in a logical order, and all statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the listed communication skills were demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified skills were demonstrated, significantly improving the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to respond to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant did not fully address the questions.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant provided complete answers to the questions.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing thorough answers to questions.
